# Example: Dashboard

Lifted from `tailwind-template/app/dashboard/page.tsx` (next-app).

## Required imports

- (none — pure Tailwind classes)

## Composition (verbatim)

```tsx
export default function Dashboard() {
  return (
    <div className="rounded-lg p-4 bg-white text-slate-900">
      Hello
    </div>
  );
}
```

## What to copy

- Surface card uses Tailwind utility classes; no CSS custom properties consumed.
